ext_name.description: Extension name shown in Chrome Web Store and chrome://extensions

ext_description.message: One keystroke to find anything in your browser. Press ⌘K to search open tabs, bookmarks, history, and top sites.
ext_description.description: Extension description in Chrome Web Store

cmd_open_all.description: Description of the batch-open keyboard command

cmd_search.description: Description of the search keyboard command

popup_searchTabsBookmarks.description: Primary search button label in popup (both has-URLs and empty states)

popup_batchOpenURLs.description: Batch open button label and section title in popup

popup_loading.description: Loading placeholder in popup and overlay

popup_openSearchHint.description: Hint word before the Alt+K kbd in popup footer ("anywhere Alt+K")

popup_loadingFailed.description: Shown in popup when URL list fails to load

popup_star.description: GitHub star link label in popup footer

popup_issue.description: GitHub issue link label in popup footer

popup_starTitle.description: Tooltip for GitHub star link in popup footer

popup_reportTitle.description: Tooltip for GitHub issue link in popup footer

popup_settingsTitle.description: Tooltip for settings button in popup

popup_themeTitle.description: Tooltip for theme toggle button in popup

options_highlightMatchesDesc.message: Emphasize matched text in result titles and URLs.

options_pinyinToggleDesc.message: Type "bd" or "baidu" to find 百度. Auto-skipped for non-Chinese titles.

options_resultsLimitDesc.message: Maximum number of results displayed in the search overlay.

options_keyboardShortcuts.description: Keyboard shortcuts section header in options page

options_openSearch.description: Shortcut label for open-search command in options page

options_batchOpen.description: Shortcut label for batch-open command in options page

options_navigate.description: Shortcut label for navigate action in options page

options_selectClose.description: Shortcut label for select/close action in options page

options_manage.description: Link to manage keyboard shortcuts page

options_batchOpenURLs.description: Batch URL list header in options page

options_add.description: Add-URL button label in options page

options_openAll.description: Open-all-URLs button label in options page

options_clearAll.description: Clear-all-URLs button label in options page

options_openUrlTitle.description: Tooltip on per-row open button in options URL list

options_removeUrlTitle.description: Tooltip on per-row remove button in options URL list

options_savedUrlsCount.description: Saved URL count, $count$ is a number

options_noUrlsYet.description: First line of empty state in options URL list

options_addUrlAbove.message: Add a URL above to get started
options_addUrlAbove.description: Second line of empty state in options URL list

options_urlPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the URL input field in options

options_github.description: GitHub repo link label in options footer

options_reportIssue.description: GitHub issue link label in options footer

options_versionLabel.description: Footer version label, $version$ is the manifest version string

overlay_searchPlaceholder.message: Search tabs, history, bookmarks, and top sites...

overlay_navigate.description: Hint label for arrow keys in overlay

overlay_select.description: Hint label for Enter key in overlay

overlay_quickPick.description: Hint label for Alt+1-9 quick pick in overlay

overlay_close.description: Hint label for Esc key in overlay

overlay_loading.description: Results counter text while search data is loading

overlay_loadError.description: Error shown in overlay when search data fails to load (base message, error detail appended)

overlay_sourceHistory.description: Badge label for history results in overlay

overlay_sourceTopSite.description: Badge label for top-site results in overlay

overlay_sourceBookmark.description: Badge label for bookmark results in overlay

overlay_sourceSearch.description: Badge label for web search option in overlay

overlay_sourceOpen.description: Badge label for open tabs in overlay

overlay_searchDefault.description: Display URL for the web search row in overlay

overlay_untitled.description: Fallback title when a tab/bookmark has no title

notify_noUrls.message: Please add URLs first before using this feature
notify_noUrls.description: Shown when batch-open fires with empty list

notify_openError.message: Error occurred while opening URLs, please check URL configuration

notify_installedBody.message: Press $search$ to search tabs & bookmarks. Use $batch$ to batch open URLs.
notify_installedBody.description: Onboarding body, $search$ and $batch$ are keyboard shortcut strings

popup_opening.description: Transient button label while triggering an action

popup_tabError.description: Error when current tab can't be obtained

popup_restrictedPage.message: Search function cannot be used on this page. Please switch to a regular webpage (like google.com) and try again.
popup_restrictedPage.description: Shown when user tries to open overlay on chrome:// or extension pages

popup_pageLoading.message: Page is still loading. Please wait for it to finish loading and try again.
popup_pageLoading.description: Shown when overlay attempted on a still-loading page

popup_initFailed.message: Search function initialization failed, please try again

options_noUrlsToOpen.description: Empty state for batch open action

options_openFailed.description: Toast on batch open failure; $reason$ is an error message

options_protocolError.message: Only HTTP and HTTPS protocols are supported
options_protocolError.description: Validation error on invalid URL protocol

options_urlEmpty.description: Validation error when URL input is empty

options_urlInvalid.description: Validation error when URL format is invalid

options_urlDuplicate.description: Validation error when URL already exists in the list

options_shortcutNotSet.description: Shown in keyboard shortcut display when a shortcut has not been configured

options_clearUrlsConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to clear all URLs? This action cannot be undone.
options_clearUrlsConfirm.description: Confirmation dialog before clearing all batch-open URLs

overlay_zeroResults.description: Results counter initial state in overlay before any search

overlay_noResults.message: No matching tabs, history, bookmarks, or top sites found
overlay_noResults.description: Empty state when search returns 0 results

overlay_searchForQuery.description: Synthetic web-search row title in overlay

overlay_websiteIconAlt.description: Alt text for result-row favicon images

overlay_unknownError.description: Fallback when error has no message
